title: Killhouse conductor plan
description: A conductor plan: deterministic instructions for executing a delegation DAG. Fields mirror the frozen half of delegation_record (plan_position, depends_on, resolved_prompt, gate, upstream_artifacts), prefixed with plan_id and target_branch.

target_branch.description: Branch name where delegations will be executed and committed.

delegations.description: List of delegations to execute in topological order.

delegation_id.description: Unique identifier for this delegation within the plan.

plan_position.description: Position in the plan hierarchy (e.g. phase-1/milestone-1/slice-1).

depends_on.description: delegation_ids this delegation depends on. May be empty.

resolved_prompt.description: The resolved prompt for this delegation.

planned_tier.description: The planned execution tier for this delegation.

gate.description: The verification gate for this delegation's output.

upstream_artifacts.description: Resolved inputs consumed by this delegation.
